steps.title: Write the percent equations
steps.content:
Convert the given percents to decimals:
$$
a=20.88(b+c)
$$
$$
b=0.87c
$$

steps.title: Rewrite in one variable
steps.content:
Substitute $b=0.87c$ into the expression for $a$:
$$
a=20.88(0.87c+c)
$$
$$
a=20.88(1.87c)
$$
$$
a=39.0456c
$$

steps.title: Convert the ratio to a percent
steps.content: Find $a$ as a percent of $b$: $$ \frac{a}{b}=\frac{39.0456c}{0.87c}=44.88 $$ As a percent, this is $4{,}488\%$. The answer is A.
